_note: Per-feature ratchet for the (#abcdef12) disambiguator visible in <title>. The hash is appended by build-plugins/ogPagesPlugin.ts:articleHashFromSlug and jobsSeoPagesPlugin.ts:buildTitleDisambiguator as a backstop against audit:title-uniqueness collisions, but it is visible in the SERP and degrades CTR. Counts can only go DOWN — fix at source by renaming colliding articles (add year, city, source qualifier) so the base title is unique without the hash. After a dedup pass, regenerate with `npm run audit:title-no-disambig-hash:rebaseline`. Initial seed (2026-05-05) reflects the simulated count from the existing dist/. The first CI build after the cap=66 + drop-brand changes lands should run :rebaseline to lock the precise floor.
